strategy.angle: Not just 'remove useMemo' — what it does under the hood, what it can't fix, and the patterns you still handle manually
strategy.title: React Compiler Deep Dive: How Automatic Memoization Actually Works Under the Hood
strategy.excerpt: React Compiler 1.0 is stable and shipped at Meta. But 'just remove useMemo' is dangerously oversimplified. Here's what the compiler actually does at build time, what it can't fix, and the patterns that still need manual optimization.
